# PERF-166 negative: use sql.NullString instead of a *string + nil check
lang: go
file: PERF-166-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "database/sql"

func LoadName(rows *sql.Rows) (string, error) {
	var name sql.NullString
	if err := rows.Scan(&name); err != nil {
		return "", err
	}
	return name.String, nil
}
